top_signals.title: Albania’s Flamingo Revolution Spreads From Kushner Resort to Political Elite
top_signals.summary: As protests in Tirana extend into a second week, they have escalated from opposition to two €5 billion ($5.7 billion) planned resorts in ecologically sensitive areas linked to Jared Kushner into demands for the entire Albanian political establishment to step aside.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: It's not just bitcoin ETFs. Corporate BTC buying has dried up too
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Knicks move within one win of title after biggest comeback in NBA Finals history
top_signals.summary: New York can clinch its ​first title since 1973 on Saturday night, when Game 5 will be ‌played in ‌San Antonio.
